pr_title: SDLC-73: Fix inverted checked-baggage haul pricing
pr_body:
## Summary
Fix the checked-baggage pricing logic in `booking_service` so short-haul flights (< 6 hours) use the short-haul default fee (€35) and long-haul flights (>= 6 hours) use the long-haul default fee (€70).

## Planned changes
- Correct the haul classification / default fee selection in `backend/app/services/booking_service.py`
- Add regression coverage in `backend/tests/services/test_booking_service.py`
- Preserve explicit checked-bag prices as the highest-priority override

## Validation
- Targeted booking-service tests for 3-hour and 6-hour boundary cases
- Explicit-price override test

## Notes
This is a localized backend pricing fix with no expected frontend impact.
reviewer_summary: Draft PR opened and awaiting human review.
